description: Returns the render scale of an object relative to the original model.
examples:
<sqf>
private _objectScale = getObjectScale MyObject;

if (_objectScale == 1) exitWith { systemChat "Original scale"; };

if (_objectScale > 1) then
{
	systemChat "Scaled up";
}
else
{
	systemChat "Scaled down";
};
</sqf>
name: getObjectScale

ret.desc: scale relative to the original model

Item.desc: object to return scale of. Can also be a [[nearestTerrainObjects|terrain object]].
Item.name: object
